WITHIN_BAND.recommendation: No action required; injection within the modelled band.

OVER_INJECTION.recommendation: Actual injection exceeds schedule beyond the band. Revise the day-ahead schedule upward / curtail if instructed by SLDC. Rupee settlement pending official CERC/KERC rate.

UNDER_INJECTION.recommendation: Actual injection below schedule beyond the band. Revise the day-ahead schedule downward / arrange balancing. Rupee settlement pending official CERC/KERC rate.
